name: PREMIUM Hoodie | Black Solid
description: Premium heavyweight cotton hoodie in solid black. Features kangaroo pocket, ribbed cuffs and hem, and custom YungDrip embroidery.

name: STRANGER THINGS | Casual Zip Hoodie
description: Streetwear zip hoodie with bold Stranger Things-inspired graphic print. Full zip with YKK zipper, split kangaroo pockets.

name: GTA | Zip Hoodie
description: GTA-themed zip hoodie with bold back print artwork. Heavy fleece lining, adjustable drawstring hood.

name: ART IS YOU | Premium Sweatshirt
description: Artistic premium sweatshirt with front and back graphic print. French terry cotton blend, relaxed fit.

name: FIGHT CLUB | Premium Zip Hoodie
description: Fight Club premium zip hoodie with screen-printed artwork. Oversized fit, heavy 400gsm cotton.

name: EYES | Premium Zip Hoodie
description: Eye-catching zip hoodie with bold eye graphic. Premium heavyweight fleece, oversized boxy fit.

name: BAD HABITS | Premium Sweatshirt
description: Bold statement sweatshirt with 'Bad Habits' typography. Drop shoulder, oversized relaxed fit.

name: SPEED HOODIE | Off-White
description: Speed-inspired pullover hoodie in off-white colorway. Minimal graphic branding, clean silhouette.

name: FACE HOODIE | Chocolate Brown
description: Rich chocolate brown hoodie with abstract face artwork. Brushed fleece interior for warmth.

name: INSURGENCE | Casual Hoodie
description: Casual everyday hoodie with insurgence graphic print. Lightweight cotton blend, regular fit.

name: KAGE | Casual Sweatshirt
description: Shadow-themed casual sweatshirt with subtle chest embroidery. Soft-touch fleece, modern crop fit.

name: COLD STARE | Oversized Tee
description: Heavy 250gsm oversized tee with bold back print. Drop shoulder, boxy streetwear fit.
